title: jasminum spectabile
intro: Jasminum spectabile, also known as the star jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, is a climbing plant native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its fragrant white flowers that bloom in the evening and night. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to alleviate various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. Consuming the plant has been found to offer several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing antioxidant properties that can help to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
